title: Transform Monday.com Updates into Instant Q&A with OpenAI & Make🚀

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Makers!

Tired of getting bogged down by repetitive tasks on Monday.com? Imagine if you could leverage the power of OpenAI to streamline your workflow and find answers in seconds. Well, now you can!

We’ve developed a groundbreaking automation that transforms Monday.com into a dynamic Q&A platform, powered by OpenAI’s ChatGPT. Here’s how it works:

Scenario:

  1. New Update Detection: Whenever a new update is added to an item on Monday.com with a specific tag (#OpenAI) and a question, our automation springs into action.

  2. AI-Powered Solutions: The automation detects the update, extracts the question, and sends it to the ChatGPT module for expert analysis.

  3. Instant Answers: ChatGPT generates a comprehensive answer, which is then seamlessly incorporated back into the same update, providing an instant solution.

  4. Organized Knowledge Vault: Both the question and answer are meticulously stored as subitems within the original item for future reference

940×252 48.7 KB

940×660 95.7 KB

Why This Automation is a Game-Changer:

  • Boost Efficiency:
    • Say goodbye to manual research and repetitive tasks! This automation frees up your time, allowing you to focus on more strategic work.
  • Empower Collaboration:
    • Facilitate knowledge sharing within your team by keeping all questions and answers readily accessible.

Ready to Supercharge Your Workflows?

This automation is a powerful example of how Make can seamlessly integrate with OpenAI to unlock a whole new level of productivity in Monday.com.

Want to Learn More?

We’re happy to share the details and help you unleash the power of AI in your own projects. Reach out to us, and let’s revolutionize the way you manage tasks together!

If you require additional assistance, please don’t hesitate to reach out to us.
